justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial request for "Monday next week" and subsequent request for "Tuesday the 9th, still around 3 PM."
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed two reasonable alternative slots on Wednesday when the initial request was unavailable, which was a good number of options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the conversation, making appropriate API calls and avoiding unnecessary turns or redundant questions.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent providing clear information and successfully booking the appointment.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search when the initial preferred time was unavailable, offering suitable alternatives without re-asking information.
